name: Proximity Test

setup.description: Pick a green with a visible flag and play from a comfortable iron distance for your tier: 50 yards (High), 80 yards (Mid), 100 yards (Low), or 120 yards (Scratch+). Hit 10 approach shots, judging each one by how close it finishes.

rules.description: Play 10 approach shots at the same target. Each ball is scored by proximity to the pin, not just whether it's on the green.
scoring: 2 points if the ball finishes within 15 feet of the pin
1 point if it's on the green but outside 15 feet
0 points if it misses the green

caption: On the green isn't good enough today -- it's all about proximity. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
